description: HOA Estoppel — requests and processes HOA estoppel certificates, tracks unpaid dues and special assessments, monitors transfer fees, and blocks closing when outstanding HOA obligations or pending litigation exist.

hard_stops.label: Estoppel Not Received Condition Outstanding
hard_stops.logic: HOA estoppel certificate has not been received — condition remains outstanding and cannot be cleared.

hard_stops.label: Unpaid Special Assessment Block Closing
hard_stops.logic: Unpaid special assessment identified on estoppel — block closing until resolved or credited on settlement statement.

hard_stops.label: Pending HOA Litigation Flag For Review
hard_stops.logic: HOA has pending litigation disclosed on estoppel — flag for title review and underwriter assessment.

soft_flags.label: High Transfer Fee
soft_flags.logic: HOA transfer fee exceeds typical range — flag for buyer awareness.

soft_flags.label: Special Assessment Pending
soft_flags.logic: HOA has a pending special assessment that may be levied post-closing — flag for buyer disclosure.

soft_flags.label: HOA Financial Concern
soft_flags.logic: HOA financials indicate low reserves or budget shortfall — flag for buyer awareness.
